info.name: School Planner
info.summary: Lesson planning tool for teachers with publish workflow
info.description:
# School Planner
School Planner is a Nextcloud app for teachers who want to plan courses, structure lessons and publish selected lesson content for students as a public website.
## Features
- Create, rename and delete courses - Plan lessons with date, slot, topic, goal and description - Build lesson flows from markdown-based elements - Upload files per element - Use recurring lessons and copy lessons between courses - Track internal reflections and teacher notes - Use a live mode for classroom progression including teacher notes - Publish selected content to a student-facing website via SFTP - Export and import complete planning data including attachments
info.author: Holger Heidkamp
